name: @andersonviudes/windsurf-api
description: Windsurf to OpenAI + Anthropic compatible API proxy. Turns Windsurf's 100+ AI models (Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Qwen, Kimi, GLM, SWE) into dual-protocol API endpoints. Zero npm deps.

scripts.test:release: node --import ./test/setup-env.mjs --test --test-force-exit test/conversation-cache/cache.test.js test/account-pool/dashboard-api.test.js test/_meta/dashboard-syntax.test.js test/native-bridge-docs.test.js test/language-server/proto-trace.test.js test/_meta/secret-scan.test.js test/_meta/test-shard-script.test.js test/_meta/release-workflow.test.js test/core/version.test.js

author: andersonviudes <andersonvieiraviudes@gmail.com> (https://github.com/andersonviudes)
